prerequisites.value: Dex 13, Dodge, Octopus Style, Acrobatics 3 ranks, Perception 3 ranks.

description.value: **Benefit:** When using this style, you gain a cumulative +1 bonus on melee attacks for each enemy that threatens you, up to a maximum equal to your Dexterity modifier. In addition, when you attempt to grapple without two free hands, you take only a â2 penalty on your combat maneuver check instead of the usual â4.
